name: app-kompas
description: KOMPAS.com mobile prototype wrapped with Capacitor for Android/iOS.

scripts.cap:add:android: npm run prepare:web && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run cap:sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.cap:add:ios: npm run prepare:web && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:sync:ios: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync ios
